verses.latin_vulgate: Psalmus ipsi David.   Misericordiam et judicium cantabo tibi, Domine ;  psallam,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְדָוִ֗ד מִ֫זְמ֥וֹר חֶֽסֶד־וּמִשְׁפָּ֥ט אָשִׁ֑ירָה לְךָ֖ יְהֹוָ֣ה אֲזַמֵּֽרָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: A psalm for David himself. Mercy and judgment I will sing to thee, O Lord: I will sing,
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin Psalmi. Minä veisaan armosta ja oikeudesta: sinulle, Herra, minä veisaan.
verses.king_james: I will sing of mercy and judgment: unto thee, O Lord, will I sing.

verses.latin_vulgate: et intelligam in via immaculata : quando venies ad me ?  Perambulabam in innocentia cordis mei, in medio domus meæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַשְׂכִּ֤ילָה ׀ בְּדֶ֬רֶךְ תָּמִ֗ים מָ֭תַי תָּב֣וֹא אֵלָ֑י אֶתְהַלֵּ֥ךְ בְּתׇם־לְ֝בָבִ֗י בְּקֶ֣רֶב בֵּיתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will understand in the unspotted way, when thou shalt come to me. I walked in the innocence of my heart, in the midst of my house.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä tahdon vaarin ottaa oikiasta tiestä, koskas minun tyköni tulet: minä tahdon vaeltaa sydämeni vakuudessa minun huoneessani.
verses.king_james: I will behave myself wisely in a perfect way. O when wilt thou come unto me? I will walk within my house with a perfect heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non proponebam ante oculos meos rem injustam ;  facientes prævaricationes odivi ;  non adhæsit mihi
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹֽא־אָשִׁ֨ית ׀ לְנֶ֥גֶד עֵינַ֗י דְּֽבַר־בְּלִ֫יָּ֥עַל עֲשֹֽׂה־סֵטִ֥ים שָׂנֵ֑אתִי לֹ֖א יִדְבַּ֣ק בִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will not set before my eyes any unjust thing: I hated the workers of iniquities.
verses.finnish_biblia: En minä ota pahaa asiaa eteeni: minä vihaan väärintekiöitä, ja en salli heitä olla tykönäni.
verses.king_james: I will set no wicked thing before mine eyes: I hate the work of them that turn aside; it shall not cleave to me.

verses.latin_vulgate: cor pravum ;  declinantem a me malignum non cognoscebam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֵבָ֣ב עִ֭קֵּשׁ יָס֣וּר מִמֶּ֑נִּי רָ֝֗ע לֹ֣א אֵדָֽע׃
verses.douay_rheims: The perverse heart did not cleave to me: and the malignant, that turned aside from me, I would not know.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nurja sydän olkoon minusta pois: en minä kärsi pahaa.
verses.king_james: A froward heart shall depart from me: I will not know a wicked person.

verses.latin_vulgate: Detrahentem secreto proximo suo, hunc persequebar :  superbo oculo, et insatiabili corde, cum hoc non edebam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: (מלושני) [מְלׇשְׁנִ֬י] בַסֵּ֨תֶר ׀ רֵעֵהוּ֮ אוֹת֢וֹ אַ֫צְמִ֥ית גְּֽבַהּ־עֵ֭ינַיִם וּרְחַ֣ב לֵבָ֑ב אֹ֝ת֗וֹ לֹ֣א אוּכָֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: The man that in private detracted his neighbour, him did I persecute. With him that had a proud eye, and an unsatiable heart, I would not eat.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka lähimmäistänsä salaa panettelee, sen minä hukutan: en minä kärsi ylpeitä ja röyhkeitä.
verses.king_james: Whoso privily slandereth his neighbour, him will I cut off: him that hath an high look and a proud heart will not I suffer.

verses.latin_vulgate: Oculi mei ad fideles terræ, ut sedeant mecum ;  ambulans in via immaculata, hic mihi ministrabat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֵינַ֤י ׀ בְּנֶֽאֶמְנֵי־אֶרֶץ֮ לָשֶׁ֢בֶת עִמָּ֫דִ֥י הֹ֭לֵךְ בְּדֶ֣רֶךְ תָּמִ֑ים ה֝֗וּא יְשָׁרְתֵֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: My eyes were upon the faithful of the earth, to sit with me: the man that walked in the perfect way, he served me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun silmäni katsovat uskollisia maan päällä, että he asuisivat minun tykönäni: joka vaeltaa oikialla tiellä, se pitää oleman minun palveliani.
verses.king_james: Mine eyes shall be upon the faithful of the land, that they may dwell with me: he that walketh in a perfect way, he shall serve me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non habitabit in medio domus meæ qui facit superbiam ;  qui loquitur iniqua non direxit in conspectu oculorum meorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹֽא־יֵשֵׁ֨ב ׀ בְּקֶ֥רֶב בֵּיתִי֮ עֹשֵׂ֢ה רְמִ֫יָּ֥ה דֹּבֵ֥ר שְׁקָרִ֑ים לֹא־יִ֝כּ֗וֹן לְנֶ֣גֶד עֵינָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that worketh pride shall not dwell in the midst of my house: he that speaketh unjust things did not prosper before my eyes.
verses.finnish_biblia: Petollisia ihmisiä en minä pidä huoneessani: ei valehteliat menesty minun tykönäni.
verses.king_james: He that worketh deceit shall not dwell within my house: he that telleth lies shall not tarry in my sight.

verses.latin_vulgate: In matutino interficiebam omnes peccatores terræ,  ut disperderem de civitate Domini omnes operantes iniquitatem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַבְּקָרִ֗ים אַצְמִ֥ית כׇּל־רִשְׁעֵי־אָ֑רֶץ לְהַכְרִ֥ית מֵעִיר־יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה כׇּל־פֹּ֥עֲלֵי אָֽוֶן׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: In the morning I put to death all the wicked of the land: that I might cut off all the workers of iniquity from the city of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Varhain minä hukutan kaikki jumalattomat maasta, hävittääkseni kaikkia pahantekiöitä Herran kaupungista.
verses.king_james: I will early destroy all the wicked of the land; that I may cut off all wicked doers from the city of the Lord.
